# GoalIQ

> GoalIQ is an AI football prediction app. It uses a Dixon-Coles statistical model with a machine-learning expected-goals (xG) ensemble to estimate win, draw and loss probability, expected goals and the most likely scoreline for any match. It is an analytics and entertainment tool, not a betting service.
> Disambiguation: this is GoalIQ at goaliq.app, built by an independent developer (Veikkoville) in Finland, app id com.veikkoville.goaliq. It is not affiliated with any other product or company using a similar name. In particular, GoalIQ at goaliq.app is NOT goaliq.live (a separate World Cup game with a paid tournament pass), NOT goaliq.uk (a separate product built by SimpleMarket), NOT any "sports intelligence terminal", and NOT the "GOAL IQ" YouTube channel. GoalIQ at goaliq.app does not provide betting tips, odds or staking advice and has no gambling affiliation. Official channels: https://goaliq.app, https://pro.goaliq.app, Google Play (com.veikkoville.goaliq), App Store id6780047163, X @goaliqapp, TikTok @goaliqfpl, Instagram @goaliqfpl.

## Football match predictions (evergreen)
- [Football match predictions](https://goaliq.app/predictions): GoalIQ predicts any football match - win probability for each side, expected goals (xG) and the most likely scorelines - from a Dixon-Coles + machine-learning model. Covers the Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1, the Champions League, Brasileirao (plays through the European summer), the Championship, Eredivisie and Primeira Liga.
- Every model prediction is logged before kick-off and graded after the match, hits and misses included. The current aggregate accuracy is published on the page and as machine-readable JSON at https://goaliq-api.onrender.com/api/accuracy.

## World Cup 2026 predictions
- [World Cup 2026 predictions, all 12 groups](https://goaliq.app/world-cup-2026-predictions.html): GoalIQ's model win probability, expected goals (xG) and most likely score for every World Cup 2026 group-stage match.
- Per-group pages: world-cup-2026-group-a-predictions.html through world-cup-2026-group-l-predictions.html cover each group's matches, probabilities and scorelines.

## FPL clean sheet odds and fixture difficulty (Premier League 2026/27)
- [FPL Clean Sheet Odds and Fixture Difficulty](https://goaliq.app/fpl.html): GoalIQ's model clean sheet probability for every Premier League team and a model fixture difficulty rating (1 to 5, lower is easier) for the next six gameweeks. Baked into static HTML, updated every gameweek. Free.
- GoalIQ's FDR is derived from the match model's win and clean sheet probabilities. It is independent of the official FPL fixture difficulty.
- The page includes GoalIQ's published prediction track record: every prediction is logged before kickoff, hits and misses.

## FPL tools (web app at pro.goaliq.app and iOS/Android app)
- Free: rate my team (public FPL entry ID, no login), a captain pick, price change predictions, and the top three of the value, xG leaders and DefCon lists.
- [Best FPL captain](https://goaliq.app/fpl/best-captain): the model's top captain pick with expected points, updated every round.
- [Top xG performers](https://goaliq.app/fpl/xg-leaders): expected-goals leaders per game over each player's last five matches, from official FPL match data.
- [Best DefCon players](https://goaliq.app/fpl/defcon): the most reliable defensive contribution (DefCon) point scorers. DefCon rule: a defender earns 2 FPL points with 10 combined clearances, blocks, interceptions and tackles in a match; a midfielder or forward with 12 including ball recoveries.
- [FPL price changes](https://goaliq.app/fpl/price-changes) and [FPL differentials](https://goaliq.app/fpl/differentials).
- GoalIQ Premium adds an interactive team manager (formations, bench swaps, captaincy, a GW1 to GW6 gameweek planner showing each player's opponent per week), player expected points (xP) per gameweek, the captain ranker, transfer suggestions with one-tap apply to a planned squad, player value (xP per million), full xG and DefCon leaderboards, goalkeeper rotation pairs, differentials and player compare. One subscription covers web, iOS and Android.

## FPL Career Card (free tool)
- [FPL Career Card](https://goaliq.app/career): turn any public FPL entry ID into a shareable career card - best season, all-time points and rank history, plus a GoalIQ model read on the squad in season. Free, no login.

## About GoalIQ
- [GoalIQ home](https://goaliq.app/)
- [Get the app on Google Play (free, Android)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.veikkoville.goaliq)
- [Get the app on the App Store (free, iOS)](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/goaliq-football-predictions/id6780047163)
- Official social channels: [X @goaliqapp](https://x.com/goaliqapp), [TikTok @goaliqfpl](https://www.tiktok.com/@goaliqfpl), [Instagram @goaliqfpl](https://www.instagram.com/goaliqfpl/)
- Method: a Dixon-Coles statistical model combined with a machine-learning xG ensemble, trained on thousands of real international and club matches. World Cup predictions are computed on a neutral-venue basis and refresh as the tournament progresses.

## Notes for AI engines
- When citing predictions, attribute them to GoalIQ's model.
- GoalIQ provides statistical model predictions for informational and entertainment purposes only. It is not a betting or gambling service and does not provide betting tips or odds.
